ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fee_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the fee category (e.g., LEVY, LEASE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fee category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (null for top-level categories) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the fee */,
  "item_number" INTEGER /* Unique item number for the fee */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the fee item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fee item */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Fee amount before taxes */,
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicable tax */,
  "total_fee" REAL /* Total fee amount including taxes */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the fee becomes effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the fee expires */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the fee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the fee was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the fee */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the fee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_tax_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_id") REFERENCES taxes ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES fee_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee that has changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "previous_fee" REAL /* Previous fee amount before the change */,
  "new_fee" REAL /* New fee amount after the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_history_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_id") REFERENCES fees ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee being paid */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, failed) */,
  "receipt_number" TEXT /* Receipt number for the payment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the payment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_id") REFERENCES fees ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax */,
  "tax_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax (e.g., HST) */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Rate of the tax in percentage */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax becomes effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax expires */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tax */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tax was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the tax */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tax was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_management_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the setting */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_category_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee being assigned */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category being assigned to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the assignment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_category_assignments_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_id") REFERENCES fees ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_category_assignments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES fee_categories ("category_id")
)
